title: 「Such that」句型
titleEn: Using Such that for an arrangement or resulting situation

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + arrange / design / structure / set up / configure + object + such that + complete clause

formulas.labelEn: Pattern A: active arrangement or design
formulas.labelZh: Pattern A：表示安排、設計或運作方式
formulas.formula: Subject + arrange / design / structure / set up / configure + object + such that + complete clause

formulas.labelEn: Pattern A: passive arrangement or design
formulas.formula: Subject + be + arranged / designed / structured / set up / configured + such that + complete clause

formulas.labelEn: Pattern B: degree, impact or situation
formulas.labelZh: Pattern B：程度、影響或情況造成的結果
formulas.formula: Noun phrase + be + such that + complete result clause

example: We structured the schedule such that everyone gets a lunch break.
exampleZh: 我們以這種方式安排日程表，讓每個人都有午休時間。

examples.en: We structured the schedule such that everyone gets a lunch break.
examples.zh: 我們以這種方式安排日程表，讓每個人都有午休時間。

examples.en: The system was designed such that any data breach triggers an alarm.
examples.zh: 該系統的設計方式，是只要有任何數據洩漏便會觸發警報。

examples.en: Her impact on the team was such that we struggled to replace her when she left.
examples.zh: 她對團隊的影響如此之大，以至於她離開時，我們很難找到人取代她。

meaning.zh: Such that 可表示某項安排、設計或結構形成的運作方式及結果，也可表示某種程度或影響強得造成指定結果。

rules.zh: Such that 後面必須接包括主詞和動詞的完整子句。
rules.en: Such that must be followed by a complete clause containing a subject and verb.
examples: The desks were arranged such that everyone could see the screen.

rules.zh: 在 arranged/designed/structured/configured such that 中，它表示安排或設計的方式與結果；在 be such that 中，它表示情況、程度或影響強得造成某結果。
rules.en: After arranged, designed, structured or configured, it describes how an arrangement works and its result; in be such that, it describes a situation, degree or impact strong enough to produce a result.

rules.zh: Such that 通常較正式，常見於報告、合約、政策、系統說明、科技及工程寫作。
rules.en: Such that is normally formal and common in reports, contracts, policies, system descriptions, and technical or engineering writing.

rules.zh: 一般不需要在 such that 前加逗號。
rules.en: A comma is generally unnecessary before such that.
examples: The form is structured such that applicants answer the easy questions first.

rules.zh: 不要把本課的 such that 與 such + adjective + noun + that 結構混淆。
rules.en: Do not confuse this lesson’s such that with the separate such + adjective + noun + that structure.
examples: The damage was such that the road had to remain closed.
It was such a serious problem that the road had to remain closed.

rules.zh: So that 目的句說明做某事的目的；such that 通常強調安排、設計或結構形成的運作方式、條件或結果。
rules.en: A purpose clause with so that explains why someone acts; such that normally emphasises the way an arrangement, design or structure operates and the condition or result it creates.
examples: I started studying for IELTS so that I could get a job.
The course was structured such that students could practise job interviews every week.

rules.zh: So + adjective + that 在 so 後直接用形容詞；be such that 則以名詞或情況作主詞，再概括結果。
rules.en: So + adjective + that places an adjective directly after so; be such that uses a noun or situation as the subject before summarising the result.
examples: The noise was so loud that we could not hear the announcement.
The noise was such that we could not hear the announcement.

benefits.zh: 清楚連繫一項安排及其結果，讓讀者明白系統、計劃或物件如何運作。
benefits.en: This structure shows exactly how a system, plan or object is arranged and what happens because of that arrangement.

benefits.zh: 可取代較長的 in such a way that，更直接地表達同一關係。
benefits.en: Instead of repeatedly writing in such a way that, you can often use such that to express the same relationship more directly.

benefits.zh: 可用來說明某項條件出現時，系統、規則或程序會自動產生的結果。
benefits.en: You can use it to explain what happens automatically when a condition is met.

benefits.zh: Be such that 能說明影響、問題或情況達到一定程度，因而造成重要結果。
benefits.en: The be such that pattern lets you explain that an impact, problem or condition was strong enough to produce an important result.

benefits.zh: 它提供另一種連接原因、條件與結果的方法，增加正式寫作的句式變化。
benefits.en: This structure gives you another way to connect causes, conditions and results in formal writing.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using such that. Use either of the two target patterns and preserve the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 such that 改寫以下句子。你可以使用上述任何一種目標格式，並須保留原句意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: We arranged the desks in a way that every student could see the board.
questions.promptZh: 我們以一種讓每名學生都能看見黑板的方式排列課桌。
questions.answer: We arranged the desks such that every student could see the board.
questions.answerZh: 我們如此排列課桌，讓每名學生都能看見黑板。
questions.highlight: We arranged the desks such that every student could see the board.

questions.prompt: Because of how this app is set up, users can save their work automatically.
questions.promptZh: 由於這個應用程式的設定方式，使用者可以自動儲存工作。
questions.answer: This app is set up such that users can save their work automatically.
questions.answerZh: 這個應用程式的設定方式，讓使用者可以自動儲存工作。
questions.highlight: This app is set up such that users can save their work automatically.

questions.prompt: Mia organised the files so that each subject had its own folder.
questions.promptZh: 米婭整理檔案，好讓每個科目都有自己的資料夾。
questions.answer: Mia organised the files such that each subject had its own folder.
questions.answerZh: 米婭以這種方式整理檔案，讓每個科目都有自己的資料夾。
questions.highlight: Mia organised the files such that each subject had its own folder.

questions.prompt: This door closes by itself because of the way it was designed.
questions.promptZh: 這道門會自行關上，這是由於它的設計方式。
questions.answer: This door was designed such that it closes by itself.
questions.answerZh: 這道門的設計方式，使它會自行關上。
questions.highlight: This door was designed such that it closes by itself.

questions.prompt: Our timetable was arranged in a way that no class lasted more than an hour.
questions.promptZh: 我們的時間表如此安排，令任何一節課都不超過一小時。
questions.answer: Our timetable was arranged such that no class lasted more than an hour.
questions.answerZh: 我們的時間表如此安排，令任何一節課都不超過一小時。
questions.highlight: Our timetable was arranged such that no class lasted more than an hour.

questions.prompt: These shelves are low enough for children to reach the lower books.
questions.promptZh: 這些書架的位置夠低，兒童可以拿到較低層的書。
questions.answer: These shelves are positioned such that children can reach the lower books.
questions.answerZh: 這些書架的位置經過安排，讓兒童可以拿到較低層的書。
questions.highlight: These shelves are positioned such that children can reach the lower books.

questions.prompt: Daniel packed the box so that the fragile items would not move.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾把箱子包裝好，以免易碎物品移動。
questions.answer: Daniel packed the box such that the fragile items would not move.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾以這種方式包裝箱子，使易碎物品不會移動。
questions.highlight: Daniel packed the box such that the fragile items would not move.

questions.prompt: These instructions were clear enough for beginners to follow them easily.
questions.promptZh: 這些指示十分清楚，初學者也能輕鬆跟從。
questions.answer: These instructions were written such that beginners could follow them easily.
questions.answerZh: 這些指示的寫法，讓初學者也能輕鬆跟從。
questions.highlight: These instructions were written such that beginners could follow them easily.

questions.prompt: The lighting controls make the lights switch off whenever nobody is in the room.
questions.promptZh: 照明控制系統會在房內無人時把燈關掉。
questions.answer: The lights are controlled such that they switch off whenever nobody is in the room.
questions.answerZh: 這些燈的控制方式，使它們在房內無人時便會關掉。
questions.highlight: The lights are controlled such that they switch off whenever nobody is in the room.

questions.prompt: Under our seating plan, every group had exactly four students.
questions.promptZh: 按照我們的座位安排，每組剛好有四名學生。
questions.answer: Our seating plan was organised such that each group included exactly four students.
questions.answerZh: 我們如此安排座位，讓每組剛好有四名學生。
questions.highlight: Our seating plan was organised such that each group included exactly four students.

questions.prompt: Even while users scroll down the page, this website keeps the main menu visible.
questions.promptZh: 即使使用者向下捲動頁面，這個網站仍會顯示主選單。
questions.answer: This website is designed such that the main menu remains visible while users scroll down the page.

questions.prompt: The alarm system has been configured so that smoke in any room triggers a warning.
questions.promptZh: 警報系統已完成設定，只要任何房間出現煙霧，便會觸發警告。
questions.answer: The alarm system has been configured such that smoke in any room triggers a warning.
questions.answerZh: 警報系統已按這種方式設定，只要任何房間出現煙霧，便會觸發警告。
questions.highlight: The alarm system has been configured such that smoke in any room triggers a warning.

questions.prompt: Chloe divided the work so each person handled one clear task.

questions.answer: Chloe divided the work such that each person handled one clear task.

questions.prompt: These questions became gradually more difficult because of the order in which they were placed.
questions.promptZh: 由於這些題目的排列次序，它們逐步變得更困難。
questions.answer: These questions were ordered such that they became gradually more difficult.

questions.highlight: These questions were ordered such that they became gradually more difficult.

questions.prompt: Passengers can reach both hospitals without changing buses because of how this route is planned.
questions.promptZh: 由於這條路線的規劃方式，乘客無須轉車便可到達兩間醫院。

questions.prompt: Because of its structure, the form asks applicants to answer the simplest questions first.
questions.promptZh: 由於表格的結構，申請人會先回答最簡單的問題。
questions.answer: The form is structured such that applicants answer the simplest questions first.

questions.highlight: The form is structured such that applicants answer the simplest questions first.

questions.prompt: These windows were placed carefully, allowing natural light to reach every desk.
questions.promptZh: 這些窗戶經過仔細設置，讓自然光照到每張書桌。
questions.answer: These windows were carefully placed such that natural light reached every desk.

questions.prompt: Whenever the cover is opened, this machine's safety programme stops it automatically.
questions.promptZh: 每當這部機器的外蓋打開時，安全程式便會自動使機器停止運作。
questions.answer: This machine is programmed such that it stops automatically whenever the cover is opened.
questions.answerZh: 這部機器的程式設定，使它在外蓋打開時便會自動停止運作。
questions.highlight: This machine is programmed such that it stops automatically whenever the cover is opened.

questions.prompt: Customers receive a receipt immediately after paying because of the way the payment process works.
questions.promptZh: 由於付款流程的運作方式，顧客付款後會立即收到收據。
questions.answer: The payment process is arranged such that customers receive a receipt immediately after paying.
questions.answerZh: 付款流程的安排方式，讓顧客付款後立即收到收據。
questions.highlight: The payment process is arranged such that customers receive a receipt immediately after paying.

questions.prompt: Our garden was designed so rainwater would flow towards the plants.
questions.promptZh: 我們的花園經過設計，讓雨水流向植物。
questions.answer: Our garden was designed such that rainwater would flow towards the plants.
questions.answerZh: 我們花園的設計方式，使雨水流向植物。
questions.highlight: Our garden was designed such that rainwater would flow towards the plants.

questions.prompt: The noise was so loud that we could not hear the announcement.
questions.promptZh: 噪音太大，以至於我們聽不到廣播。
questions.answer: The noise was such that we could not hear the announcement.
questions.answerZh: 噪音的程度令我們聽不到廣播。
questions.highlight: The noise was such that we could not hear the announcement.

questions.prompt: Her explanation was clear enough for even the youngest pupils to understand the idea.
questions.promptZh: 她的解釋十分清楚，連年紀最小的學生也能明白這個概念。
questions.answer: Her explanation was such that even the youngest pupils could understand the idea.

questions.prompt: Because the road suffered severe damage, it had to remain closed.
questions.promptZh: 由於道路嚴重受損，它必須繼續封閉。
questions.answer: The damage to the road was such that it had to remain closed.

questions.highlight: The damage to the road was such that it had to remain closed.

questions.prompt: His strong influence on the team meant that morale fell after he left.
questions.promptZh: 他對團隊的影響很大，因此他離開後，團隊士氣下降。
questions.answer: His influence on the team was such that morale fell after he left.
questions.answerZh: 他對團隊的影響如此之大，以至於他離開後，團隊士氣下降。
questions.highlight: His influence on the team was such that morale fell after he left.

questions.prompt: The heat was so intense that several runners stopped before the finish.
questions.promptZh: 天氣酷熱得令數名跑手在到達終點前停下來。
questions.answer: The heat was such that several runners stopped before the finish.
questions.answerZh: 酷熱的程度令數名跑手在到達終點前停下來。
questions.highlight: The heat was such that several runners stopped before the finish.

questions.prompt: There was so much demand that the shop sold out before noon.
questions.promptZh: 需求非常高，店舖在中午前便售罄。

questions.prompt: The delay caused us to miss the final connecting train.
questions.promptZh: 這次延誤令我們錯過尾班接駁列車。
questions.answer: The delay was such that we missed the final connecting train.
questions.answerZh: 延誤的情況令我們錯過尾班接駁列車。
questions.highlight: The delay was such that we missed the final connecting train.

questions.prompt: The evidence was strong enough to persuade the committee to reopen the investigation.
questions.promptZh: 證據充分得足以說服委員會重新展開調查。
questions.answer: The evidence was such that the committee reopened the investigation.
questions.answerZh: 證據十分充分，以至於委員會重新展開調查。
questions.highlight: The evidence was such that the committee reopened the investigation.

questions.prompt: Because the risk was serious, the doctor advised her not to travel.
questions.promptZh: 由於風險嚴重，醫生建議她不要出行。
questions.answer: The risk was such that the doctor advised her not to travel.
questions.answerZh: 風險之高，令醫生建議她不要出行。
questions.highlight: The risk was such that the doctor advised her not to travel.

questions.prompt: The crowd was so large that extra staff had to manage the entrance.

questions.prompt: This bridge can expand slightly in hot weather because of the way it is constructed.
questions.promptZh: 由於這座橋的建造方式，它在炎熱天氣下可以稍微膨脹。
questions.answer: This bridge is constructed such that it can expand slightly in hot weather.

questions.prompt: As soon as books are returned, our library system makes them available for borrowing.
questions.promptZh: 書籍一經歸還，我們的圖書館系統便會讓其他人借閱。

questions.prompt: In our data table, one row represents one customer.

questions.prompt: The packaging of this medicine makes the bottle difficult for children to open.
questions.promptZh: 這種藥物的包裝使兒童難以打開藥瓶。
questions.answer: This medicine is packaged such that children cannot open the bottle easily.

questions.prompt: The lesson plan had students first observe an example and then create their own.
questions.promptZh: 課堂計劃讓學生先觀察例子，然後創作自己的例子。
questions.answer: The lesson was planned such that students first observed an example and then created their own.
questions.answerZh: 課堂的設計方式，是讓學生先觀察例子，然後創作自己的例子。

questions.prompt: Our emergency plan gives staff more than one exit route.
questions.promptZh: 我們的緊急應變計劃為職員提供多於一條逃生路線。
questions.answer: Our emergency plan is designed such that staff can leave through more than one exit.
questions.answerZh: 我們的緊急應變計劃的設計方式，讓職員可以經多於一個出口離開。

questions.prompt: The hospital was under so much pressure that non-urgent operations had to be postponed.
questions.promptZh: 醫院承受極大壓力，以至於非緊急手術必須延期。
questions.answer: Pressure on the hospital was such that non-urgent operations had to be postponed.
questions.answerZh: 醫院承受的壓力如此之大，以至於非緊急手術必須延期。
questions.highlight: Pressure on the hospital was such that non-urgent operations had to be postponed.

questions.prompt: The partners trusted each other so much that they could settle minor problems without formal meetings.
questions.promptZh: 合作夥伴非常信任彼此，因此無須召開正式會議也能解決小問題。
questions.answer: Trust between the partners was such that they could settle minor problems without formal meetings.
questions.answerZh: 合作夥伴之間的信任程度，使他們無須召開正式會議也能解決小問題。
questions.highlight: Trust between the partners was such that they could settle minor problems without formal meetings.

questions.prompt: The misunderstanding was so complete that both teams believed the other had cancelled the event.
questions.promptZh: 誤會非常徹底，兩個團隊都以為對方取消了活動。
questions.answer: The misunderstanding was such that both teams believed the other had cancelled the event.
questions.answerZh: 誤會的程度令兩個團隊都以為對方取消了活動。
questions.highlight: The misunderstanding was such that both teams believed the other had cancelled the event.

questions.prompt: The large price difference led many customers to choose the smaller model.
questions.promptZh: 巨大的價格差距令許多顧客選擇較小的型號。
questions.answer: The difference in price was such that many customers chose the smaller model.
questions.answerZh: 價格差距之大，令許多顧客選擇較小的型號。
questions.highlight: The difference in price was such that many customers chose the smaller model.

questions.prompt: The redesign means that a single error no longer stops the whole process.
questions.promptZh: 重新設計後，單一錯誤不再令整個流程停止。
questions.answer: After the redesign, the system operates such that a single error no longer stops the whole process.
questions.answerZh: 重新設計後，系統的運作方式使單一錯誤不再令整個流程停止。
questions.highlight: After the redesign, the system operates such that a single error no longer stops the whole process.

questions.prompt: This contract allowed either party to end it by giving thirty days' notice.
questions.promptZh: 這份合約容許任何一方在提前三十日通知後終止合約。
questions.answer: This contract was drafted such that either party could end it by giving thirty days' notice.
questions.answerZh: 這份合約的草擬方式，容許任何一方在提前三十日通知後終止合約。
questions.highlight: This contract was drafted such that either party could end it by giving thirty days' notice.

questions.prompt: The survey kept every respondent's name separate from their answers.
questions.promptZh: 這項調查把每名受訪者的姓名與其答案分開保存。
questions.answer: The survey was organised such that no respondent's name was linked to their answers.
questions.answerZh: 這項調查的安排方式，使任何受訪者的姓名都不會與其答案連結。
questions.highlight: The survey was organised such that no respondent's name was linked to their answers.

questions.prompt: Her impact on the team was so great that we struggled to replace her when she left.
questions.promptZh: 她對團隊的影響非常大，以至於她離開時，我們很難找到人取代她。
questions.answer: Her impact on the team was such that we struggled to replace her when she left.
questions.answerZh: 她對團隊的影響如此之大，以至於她離開時，我們很難找到人取代她。
questions.highlight: Her impact on the team was such that we struggled to replace her when she left.

questions.prompt: The schedule gave everyone a lunch break, and the afternoon sessions still began on time.
questions.promptZh: 這份日程表讓每個人都有午休時間，而下午的環節仍能準時開始。
questions.answer: The schedule was structured such that everyone had a lunch break and the afternoon sessions began on time.
questions.answerZh: 這份日程表的安排方式，讓每個人都有午休時間，而下午的環節亦能準時開始。
questions.highlight: The schedule was structured such that everyone had a lunch break and the afternoon sessions began on time.

questions.prompt: The designers built the security system so that any data breach would trigger an alarm and alert the technical team immediately.
questions.promptZh: 設計人員建立這套保安系統，讓任何數據洩漏都會觸發警報，並立即通知技術團隊。
questions.answer: The security system was designed such that any data breach would trigger an alarm and alert the technical team immediately.
questions.answerZh: 這套保安系統的設計方式，是任何數據洩漏都會觸發警報，並立即通知技術團隊。
questions.highlight: The security system was designed such that any data breach would trigger an alarm and alert the technical team immediately.
